title: BRAIN Journal - Automatic Anthropometric System Development Using Machine Learning
author: Long The Nguyen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
ABSTRACT 

 The contactless automatic anthropometric system is proposed for the reconstruction of the 3D-model of the human body using the conventional smartphone. Our approach involves three main steps. The first step is the extraction of 12 anthropological features. Then we determine the most important features. Finally, we employ these features to build the 3D model of the human body and classify them according to gender and the commonly used sizes.
